name: socialnexis-post-tools
description: AI detector and humanizer for LinkedIn/X posts, post quality analyzer, and structured post idea generator. Free, no API key.
long_description:
Three free tools for social post quality, no API key required.

1. check_post_tells: deterministic scan for AI-writing tells (em dashes, buzzwords, markdown artifacts, unattributed authority, self-labeled takes) and reach best practices (engagement bait, weak openers, hashtag stuffing). Every finding includes the verbatim quote, its character range, and a prescriptive fix.

2. analyze_post: adds a judged six-axis quality rubric (substance, hook, concreteness, topic clarity, question quality, self-containedness) and a match against 12 proven post structures. Free daily limit: 10 analyses.

3. generate_post_ideas: turns a topic or pasted article into 3 ready-to-write post ideas (hook, thesis, outline), each on a proven post structure. Never invents facts or citations. Free daily limit: 2 calls (6 ideas).

From socialnexis.com/mcp.

tools.name: check_post_tells
tools.description: Detect AI-writing tells and reach mistakes in a LinkedIn/X post draft, with the exact quote and fix for each. Instant and free.

tools.name: analyze_post
tools.description: Full post quality analysis: tells scan plus a six-axis rubric and a match against 12 proven post structures.

tools.name: generate_post_ideas
tools.description: 3 ready-to-write LinkedIn/X post ideas (hook, thesis, outline) from a topic or pasted article. Never invents citations.
